title: Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) competitiveness and growth reports
body: "This is a collection of the FCA’s reports on how it is embedding its secondary to facilitate, subject to aligning with relevant international standards, the international competitiveness of the economy of the United Kingdom (including in particular the financial services sector), and its growth in the medium to long term. These documents were presented to Parliament pursuant to Section 26 of the Financial Services and Markets Act 2023. "
